context.phase_31h_result: streaming sparse apply matches dense reference, max_diff 1.24e-05
context.additive_sidecars_failed: W_ref stayed resident and sidecars added memory

A_loader_substitution.description: Do not load W_ref; load W_low + residual metadata; graph sees replacement op/tensor

B_graph_custom_op.description: Intercept ffn_up/ffn_down matmul; compute X @ W_low + X @ R_sparse; guard W_ref absent

C_offline_model_rewrite.description: Pre-process GGUF: replace tensor with W_low; store residual as sidecar; custom op reads sidecar

D_toy_harness.description: Standalone forward pass in Python/minimal C++; validatest economics outside llama.cpp

no_additive_trap_requirements.description: All 8 requirements must hold for ANY future integration

requirements.requirement: W_ref not resident for substituted tensor

requirements.verification: error or ConfigRequired, not silent fallback

no_additive_trap_requirements.central_risk: Additive trap: W_ref + R instead of W_low + R if W_ref stays resident AND residual is applied

runtime_counters.substituted_tensor_count: int — number of tensors replaced with W_low + residual
runtime_counters.skipped_ref_tensor_bytes: int — total bytes of W_ref NOT loaded
runtime_counters.low_tensor_bytes_loaded: int — total bytes of W_low actually loaded
runtime_counters.residual_encoded_bytes_loaded: int — total bytes of compressed residual loaded
runtime_counters.custom_op_calls: int — number of substitutive forward calls
runtime_counters.memory_margin_vs_q4: int — (W_low + residual) - W_ref for substituted tensors

rationale: 31I mean delta_cosine: ffn_up +0.063 vs ffn_down +0.075 (both good)
AVX2_numba did NOT speed up kernel over CSR_scalar (31L finding)
ffn_down Python CSR at 19.6ms too slow for real-time runtime budget
first_integration_target.not_recommended: ffn_down — compute risk too high; needs C++ AVX2 SIMD optimization first

B_substitution_path.purpose: Prove custom path fires for substituted tensors

C_memory_accounting.purpose: Prove W_low + residual < W_ref for selected tensor

D_correctness.purpose: Output matches standalone harness within tolerance

E_fail_fast.purpose: If residual missing, do not silently use native
E_fail_fast.assertion: residual_encoded_bytes_loaded == 0 → raise error or ConfigRequired, additive_fallback_calls == 0

F_additive_trap.purpose: Prove W_ref and residual are not both resident

compute_risk_analysis.avx2_numba_vs_csr_scalar: NOT faster — AVX2 numba showed 0.97x for ffn_up, ~1.0x for ffn_down
compute_risk_analysis.ffn_down_bottleneck: column-iterate traversal on W^T (4864,896) shape — X @ R^T requires all-rows access per output column
compute_risk_analysis.current_kernel_too_slow_for_runtime: ffn_down YES — 19.6ms borderline for interactive per-token latency
compute_risk_analysis.integration_requires_real_cpp_simd: ffn_down YES (needs C++ AVX2 intrinsics); ffn_up NO (3.3ms already acceptable)
compute_risk_analysis.should_integrate_ffn_up_first: YES — lower risk, proven speedup, acceptable latency

cheaper_residual_layout_needed.reason: Transposed residual storage changes column-iterate to row-iterate for ffn_down; batch_specialized only helped at B=4+ (3.67x), flat at B=1
cheaper_residual_layout_needed.suggested_layout: R_sparse_transposed — store residual as CSR on (896, nnz_per_row) so row-iterate matches output column access

recommended_next_phase.option: Phase 31N — Toy Substitutive Runtime Harness (ffn_up only)
recommended_next_phase.description: Build minimal standalone forward pass using W_low + residual for ffn_up; exercise all 6 acceptance tests; prove economics outside llama.cpp
what_it_does: Load W_low (Q2) for ffn_up tensors from existing files
Load residual (R_sparse) from Phase 31I encoded files
Compute Y = X @ W_low + X @ R_sparse for activation inputs
Validate output matches Phase 31I harness reference
follow_on_options: Phase 31O: C++ kernel optimization for ffn_down (real AVX2 intrinsics)
Phase 31P: llama.cpp loader substitution design doc (enables Option B/A)
